issue.message: `onBackPressed` is no longer called for back gestures; migrate to AndroidX's backward compatible `OnBackPressedDispatcher`
Reflective access to addAssetPath, which is not part of the public SDK and therefore likely to change in future Android releases
Call requires API level 31 (current min is 29): `dynamicDarkColorScheme`
Call requires API level 31 (current min is 29): `dynamicLightColorScheme`

To get local formatting use `getDateInstance()`, `getDateTimeInstance()`, or `getTimeInstance()`, or use `new SimpleDateFormat(String template, Locale locale)` with for example `Locale.US` for ASCII dates.
A newer version of Gradle than 9.3.1 is available: 9.4.1
A newer version of androidx.appcompat:appcompat than 1.7.0 is available: 1.7.1
A newer version of com.google.android.material:material than 1.12.0 is available: 1.13.0
A newer version of androidx.compose:compose-bom than 2026.03.00 is available: 2026.03.01
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlin.android than 2.3.10 is available: 2.3.20
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlin.plugin.compose than 2.3.10 is available: 2.3.20
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlin.plugin.parcelize than 2.3.10 is available: 2.3.20
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlin.plugin.serialization than 2.3.10 is available: 2.3.20
A newer version of io.ktor:ktor-client-content-negotiation than 3.4.1 is available: 3.4.2
A newer version of io.ktor:ktor-client-core than 3.4.1 is available: 3.4.2
A newer version of io.ktor:ktor-client-logging-jvm than 3.4.1 is available: 3.4.2
A newer version of io.ktor:ktor-client-okhttp than 3.4.1 is available: 3.4.2
A newer version of io.ktor:ktor-serialization-kotlinx-json than 3.4.1 is available: 3.4.2
A newer version of com.github.chuckerteam.chucker:library than 4.1.0 is available: 4.3.1
A newer version of com.github.chuckerteam.chucker:library-no-op than 4.1.0 is available: 4.3.1
PathDataNode.nodesToPath can only be called from within the same library group prefix (referenced groupId=`androidx.core` with prefix androidx from groupId=`VibeApp`)
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).

issue.errorLine1: <string name="system_prompt_description">A system prompt is a set of instructions, guidelines, and contextual information that\'s given to AI models before they interact with user queries.</string>

<string name="temperature_setting_description">Temperature is an amount of randomness injected into the response. Usually defaults to 1.0.\nSet low temperature for more focused and deterministic answers, and high for random answers.</string>

<string name="top_p_setting_description">In nucleus sampling, we compute the cumulative distribution over all the options for each subsequent token in decreasing probability order and cut it off once it reaches a particular probability specified by this value.\nMost models usually recommend altering this or temperature but not both.</string>
<string name="feedback_description">We are open to all kinds of feedback!</string>
<string name="api_url_cautions">The url must end with a \'/\'.</string>
<string name="chat_models_description">Set model identifiers for each provider in this chat only.</string>
<string name="platform_name_supporting">Give your platform a memorable name</string>
<string name="api_key_supporting">Your API key is stored locally</string>
<string name="model_supporting">Enter the model identifier exactly as specified by the API</string>
<string name="delete_platform_confirmation">Are you sure you want to delete this platform? This action cannot be undone.</string>
<string name="extended_thinking_description">Enable for reasoning models (o1, o3, Claude with thinking, Gemini thinking)</string>
<string name="choose_platform_type_description">Select the AI provider you want to add</string>
<string name="platform_basics_description">Give your platform a name and verify the API URL</string>
<string name="api_key_description">Enter your API key. This is stored locally on your device.</string>
<string name="api_key_optional_note">API key is optional for local providers like Ollama</string>
<string name="model_description">Enter the model identifier you want to use</string>
<string name="notification_channel_ongoing_desc">Shows when AI agent tasks are running in the background</string>
<string name="notification_channel_result_desc">Notifications when AI agent tasks complete or fail</string>
<string name="notification_task_failed_text">Task failed for \'%s\'. Tap to see errors.</string>

<string name="notification_permission_rationale">With notification permission, VibeApp can work in the background — you don\'t need to stay on this page. You\'ll be notified when the task is done.</string>
<string name="clear_chat_history_message">This will delete all messages in this conversation to reset the context. Generated code files will not be affected.</string>
<string name="debug_log_description">Enable diagnostic log viewer in chat page</string>

issue.message: The resource string "openai" is marked as translatable="false", but is translated to "tr" (Turkish) here
The resource string "anthropic" is marked as translatable="false", but is translated to "tr" (Turkish) here
The resource string "github" is marked as translatable="false", but is translated to "tr" (Turkish) here
The resource string "github_link" is marked as translatable="false", but is translated to "tr" (Turkish) here
The resource string "bug_report_link" is marked as translatable="false", but is translated to "tr" (Turkish) here
The resource string "feedback_link" is marked as translatable="false", but is translated to "tr" (Turkish) here
Formatting %d followed by words ("selected"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("projects"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("tasks"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Missing x86_64 ABI support for ChromeOS
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 29. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
The resource `R.drawable.ic_attach_file` appears to be unused
The resource `R.drawable.ic_image` appears to be unused
The resource `R.mipmap.ic_launcher_round` appears to be unused
The resource `R.drawable.ic_send` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <vector xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:autoMirrored="true" android:height="24dp" android:tint="#000000" android:viewportHeight="24" android:viewportWidth="24" android:width="24dp">

issue.message: The resource `R.mipmap.ic_vibe_app` appears to be unused
The resource `R.drawable.ic_vibe_app_foreground` appears to be unused
The resource `R.drawable.ic_vibe_app_monochrome_foreground` appears to be unused
Found bitmap drawable `res/drawable/ic_vibe.webp` in densityless folder
The following unrelated icon files have identical contents: ic_vibe.webp, ic_launcher_round.webp
Use the KTX extension function `String.toUri` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `String.toUri` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `String.toUri` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `Canvas.withScale` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `Canvas.withTranslation` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `String.toColorInt` instead?
